div.p: Objective: $y = Ax$ for $A \in \mathbb{R}^{4096 \times 4096}$, $x, y \in \mathbb{R}^{4096}$ Performance Impact: $12.34\text{ms} \rightarrow 3.21\text{ms}$ ($3.8\times$ Speedup)
Shared Memory Tiling Coalesced loading of $x$-vector segments into __shared__ memory to satisfy $N$ threads with $1$ global fetch.
